billing.label: Billing & tax
billing.description: Invoice series, VAT and tax compliance.

locked.title: You don't have access to this section

emptyCategory.title: No options available

loadError.description: Couldn't load this editor. Try again in a few seconds.

onboarding.title: Finish setting up your clinic
onboarding.subtitle: You have {count} pending steps to complete initial setup.

clinicInfo.label: Complete the clinic profile
clinicInfo.description: Name, tax ID and address show up on quotes and invoices.

cabinets.label: Create at least one cabinet
cabinets.description: Without cabinets you can't schedule appointments.

settings.cabinetsDescription: Rooms or boxes where patients are treated.
settings.usersDescription: Accounts with access to this clinic and their roles.
settings.profileDescription: Your personal information in this clinic.
settings.clinicInfoDescription: This data will appear on quotes and documents
settings.legalNameHelp: Legal name of the entity for invoicing. Leave blank to use the clinic name.
settings.timezoneHelp: All schedules and appointments are interpreted in this timezone.
settings.currencyHelp: Clinic-wide currency used in quotes, invoices and the catalog.
settings.deleteUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove
settings.deleteUserNote: The user will lose access to this clinic but their account will not be deleted.
settings.deleteCabinetConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the cabinet
settings.deleteCabinetNote: Existing appointments in this cabinet will not be affected.

modules.title: Modules
modules.subtitle: Install, uninstall and upgrade clinic modules.
modules.description: Manage which modules are active in your clinic.

confirmInstall.title: Install {name}?
confirmInstall.message: The module will be scheduled for install and become active after applying changes.
confirmInstall.scheduled: These dependencies will also be installed:

confirmUninstall.title: Uninstall {name}?
confirmUninstall.warning: The module tables will be removed. A pg_dump backup is created first so data can be recovered.
confirmUninstall.forceHint: Ignores dependent modules. Only use this if you know what you're doing.

confirmUpgrade.title: Upgrade {name}?
confirmUpgrade.message: The module will be upgraded to the on-disk manifest version when changes are applied.

confirmApply.title: Apply changes
confirmApply.message: The backend will restart. The session may be briefly interrupted while pending operations run.

doctor.banner: Issues detected in the module system.

toasts.scheduled: Operation scheduled. Apply changes to complete.

createForm.title: New patient
createForm.phoneHint: You can add it later on the patient record.

common.offline: Offline — data may not be up to date

toast.duplicateName: A cabinet with this name already exists

empty.title: No results
empty.description: Adjust the filters or clear them to see all records.

catalog.title: Treatment Catalog
catalog.description: Manage treatments, pricing, and tax configuration
catalog.name: Name
catalog.deleteItemConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the treatment "{name}"?

pricingStrategy.label: Pricing strategy
pricingStrategy.help: How the treatment price is computed when applied

surfacePrices.title: Prices by surface count
surfacePrices.help: Define the price for 1–5 surfaces. When surfaces are picked on a tooth, the matching tier is used. Missing tiers fall back to the nearest lower populated tier.

sessions.title: Sessions (fractional billing)
sessions.help: Define the named steps over which this treatment is delivered and billed (e.g. crown: 'Impressions' + 'Placement'). The sum must equal the base price.
sessions.label: Label

catalog.categoryKeyExists: A category with this key already exists
catalog.itemCodeExists: A treatment with this code already exists
catalog.odontogramMappingDescription: Associate this treatment with an odontogram visualization type so it appears in the patient chart.
catalog.odontogramMappingHint: Treatment characteristics will be automatically adjusted based on the selected type.

vatTypes.title: VAT Types
vatTypes.description: Manage VAT types available for treatments
vatTypes.name: Name
vatTypes.systemNote: System VAT types can only have their default status changed.
vatTypes.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the VAT type
vatTypes.deleteNote: Treatments using this VAT type will not be affected.

treatmentPlans.title: Treatment Plans
treatmentPlans.noPlans: This patient has no treatment plans
treatmentPlans.noPlansHint: Mark treatments on the dental chart and create a plan to organize them
treatmentPlans.searchPlaceholder: Search by number, patient or title...

modal.subtitle: Organize patient treatments
modal.quickTip: After creating the plan you can add treatments from the odontogram or catalog.

items.title: Treatments
items.assignedProfessionalAriaLabel: Change assigned dentist for this treatment

cascadeReassign.title: Reassign pending treatments?
cascadeReassign.body: You changed the plan dentist. {count} pending treatment(s) were assigned to {previousName}. Reassign them to the new dentist as well?

confirmations.activateDescription: Confirming unlocks quote generation and appointment scheduling. You can keep adding or completing treatments afterwards.
confirmations.unlockIntro: This plan has quote {number} already issued. To modify it, the current quote must be cancelled.
confirmations.unlockConsequence1: Quote {number} will be cancelled and no longer valid for the patient.
confirmations.unlockConsequence2: You can add, edit or remove treatments from the plan.
confirmations.unlockConsequence3: You will need to generate a new quote when you are done with the changes.
confirmations.unlockConsequence4: The cancelled quote is kept in history for traceability.
confirmations.cancelDescription: The plan will move to cancelled state and any non-performed planned treatments will be removed from the odontogram. Plan history is kept.

completionNudge.title: Complete treatment
completionNudge.description: Add a clinical note capturing what happened at this visit before marking it completed.

byPlan.empty: This patient has no clinical notes in any treatment plan

confirm.title: Confirm plan
confirm.description: The plan will move to Pending and a draft quote will be auto-created. Treatments become read-only once confirmed.

reopen.title: Reopen plan for editing
reopen.description: This will cancel the current quote. The plan returns to Draft so you can edit treatments.

close.title: Close plan
close.description: Choose the closure reason. Pending treatments will be archived.

reactivate.title: Reactivate closed plan
reactivate.description: This will reactivate a plan closed on {date} as «{reason}». Continue?

contactLog.title: Log contact
contactLog.description: Records the touchpoint without changing the plan status.

budget.title: Quotes
budget.selectPatientHint: Search and select the patient for this quote
budget.validUntilHint: Leave empty for quote without expiration date

signature.title: Digital signature
signature.hashHint: Hash {short} — binds the signature to this exact PDF. Any change would invalidate it.
signature.downloadError: Could not download the signed PDF.
signature.notSigned: No signature has been captured for this quote yet.
signature.accept: I accept the terms of the quote

confirmations.sendDescription: The quote will be marked as sent.

send.description: You can send the quote by email or mark it as manually sent (printed or handed over).
send.customMessagePlaceholder: Add a message for the patient...
send.manualNote: The quote will be marked as sent without sending any email.

errors.onlyDraft: Only draft quotes can be edited

renegotiate.title: Renegotiate quote
renegotiate.description: This will cancel the current quote and reopen the plan to Draft so you can adjust treatments.

acceptInClinic.title: Accept quote in clinic
acceptInClinic.description: Capture the patient acceptance. You can collect a tablet signature (optional).

setPublicCode.title: Set access code
setPublicCode.description: This patient has neither phone nor date of birth on file. Set a 4-6 digit code and share it verbally with the patient. DO NOT include the code in the email.

publicLink.title: Patient link
publicLink.help: Copy this link and share it with the patient via WhatsApp, SMS or email. They will be asked for one verification detail before viewing the quote.
publicLink.whatsappNoPhone: The patient has no phone on file

public.title: Your quote
public.intro: {clinic} has sent you this quote. Review the treatments and choose an option.
public.subtitle: Your personalised treatment plan
public.expired: This quote has expired. Please contact the clinic.
public.locked: Access locked after too many attempts. Please call the clinic.
public.already_accepted: You already accepted this quote. The clinic will contact you to schedule your first appointment.
public.already_rejected: You rejected this quote. If you change your mind, please call the clinic.

download.notSigned: This quote has no signature attached yet.
download.error: Could not download the PDF. Please try again.
download.reauthIntro: For security, please verify your identity again to download the signed PDF.

verify.title: Verify your identity
verify.intro: To protect your information, confirm one detail before viewing your quote.
verify.manual_code_label: Code given to you by the clinic
verify.locked: Access locked after too many attempts. Please call the clinic.

accept.title: Accept and sign
accept.consent: I accept this quote and authorise the described treatment.
accept.success: Done! The clinic will contact you to schedule your first appointment.

reject.title: Not interested
reject.intro: Why is this quote not for you?

settings.title: Quote settings
settings.description: Configure expiry, reminders and public-link verification.

expiry.title: Expiry and auto-close
expiry.description: How long a quote is valid before expiring and when to auto-close pending plans.

reminders.title: Automatic reminders
reminders.description: Toggle 7d / 14d email reminders to patients with no response.

publicLink.title: Public link and verification
publicLink.description: Configure the protection of the patient-facing quote link.

expiry.validityHelp: After this many days without response the quote becomes Expired (range 7-180).
expiry.autoCloseHelp: Plans with an expired quote and no action for this many days move to Closed (range 7-180).

reminders.enabledHelp: When on, the system emails the patient about pending quotes. When off, reception follows up manually.

publicLink.authDisabledHelp: When on, the patient sees the quote with the link only — no phone or DOB challenge. Accept the risk if the link is shared.

language.cardDescription: Language used in the patient-facing quote view, emails and SMS.
language.title: Patient communications language
language.label: Language
language.help: Applies to the patient-facing quote view and the automated email/SMS templates. Staff UI keeps each user's own language preference.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.pageDescription: Configure which notifications are sent automatically and which require manual sending.
notifications.autoVsManualDescription: Define which notifications are sent automatically when an event occurs and which require the user to send them manually.
notifications.testEmailDescription: We will send a test email to verify the configuration works correctly.
notifications.providerNote: Email server configuration is done in the server environment variables.
notifications.infoAutoSend: Auto send: The notification is sent when the event occurs (e.g., when creating an appointment).
notifications.infoManualSend: Manual send: A button will appear to send the notification when desired.
notifications.infoDisabled: Disabled: The notification will not be sent and the send option will not appear.

types.appointment_confirmation_desc: Confirmation email when an appointment is scheduled
types.appointment_cancelled_desc: Notification email when an appointment is cancelled
types.budget_accepted_desc: Confirmation email when a quote is accepted

smtp.title: Email server configuration
smtp.description: Configure the SMTP server to send emails from your clinic. Each clinic can have its own configuration.
smtp.passwordHint: Leave empty to keep current password
smtp.test_success: SMTP connection successful. Test email sent.
smtp.consoleNote: In console mode, emails are displayed in the server console instead of being sent. Useful for development.
smtp.disabledNote: With email disabled, no email notifications will be sent from this clinic.

invoice.billingFromPatientHint: This data comes from the patient's record. To modify it, edit the patient's billing information.

collect.noteToOnAccount: will be credited to the patient on-account.

invoice.creditNoteReasonPlaceholder: Describe the reason for the credit note...
invoice.creditNoteInfo: A credit note will be created for the full invoice amount.

prompts.voidPaymentReason: Enter the reason for voiding this payment

invoice.selectItemsHint: Select the quote items you want to invoice

confirmations.issueDescription: Once issued, the invoice cannot be edited. Only payments can be recorded or credit notes created.

send.title: Send invoice
send.description: You can send the invoice by email or mark it as sent manually (printed or delivered in person).
send.customMessagePlaceholder: Add a message for the patient...
send.manualNote: The invoice will be marked as sent without sending any email.

errors.onlyDraft: Only draft invoices can be edited
errors.canOnlyDeleteDraft: Only draft invoices can be deleted
errors.itemsRequired: At least one item is required
errors.selectCatalogItem: Please select a treatment from the catalog
errors.cannotEdit: Only draft invoices can be edited
errors.billingIncomplete: The invoice cannot be issued because billing data is incomplete. Please fill in the patient's billing information to continue.
